ItacAcademyItem.Name: Sviati (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: The only publication related to this Academy, and not included in British Library catalogue, is the prose comedy Le lettere di cambio, comedia degl` Ill.mi signori Academici Sviati rappresentata in Siena [...] (Viterbo, Girolamo Discepolo, 1606 - but also Venezia, Giovanni Alberti, 1606).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
